stocks.impact_theory: Arm announced its first in-house AGI CPU chip, with CEO projecting $15-25B revenue by 2031, marking a pivot from licensing to full-chip manufacturing like Nvidia. Economic implications: Diversifies revenue, boosts AI chip market share. Market psychology: Excitement over Nvidia-like growth chapter, FOMO buying despite dilution risks. Historical parallels: Nvidia's 2023 AI boom (+200%). Analogies: 1. Like Apple entering chip design with M1, vertical integration. 2. Ford launching EVs amid auto shift.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Premarket +13%, continued surge on AI hype; X sentiment mixed short-term caution but long-term positive; web news highlights game-changer status.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 20-30% gains to $170-180 on AI adoption; hold through volatility.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short risks blowup if revenue beats; potential -10% if dilution fears grow.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Supply constraints, customer shift to in-house chips, valuation compression.

stocks.justification: Clear catalyst, strong premarket move, aligns with AI megatrend.

stocks.impact_theory: US sends 15-point Iran peace plan, oil falls 4-5% to $94 Brent on de-escalation hopes, hurting energy profits. Implications: Lower input costs for consumers boost economy, but squeezes margins. Psychology: Risk-off from war premium unwind. Parallels: 2019 US-Iran tensions oil spike/reversal. Analogies: 1. Deflating balloon after hype. 2. Summer storm passing, easing flood fears.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Oil tumble drags sector; X posts note retreat post-rally; broad market up but energy lags.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long if peace fails, +10% rebound on oil spike.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Iran rejection escalates war, oil surges; geopolitical wildcard.

stocks.justification: Strong correlation to oil, but talks uncertain per Iran denials.

stocks.impact_theory: Oversold at weekly/monthly MAs, BofA reinstates Buy $500 PT on AI/cloud. Implications: Stabilizes tech amid rotation. Psychology: Value buy after 25% drop. Parallels: META 2022 recovery. Analogies: 1. Bouncing ball at bottom. 2. Phoenix from valuation ashes.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Analyst upgrades, technical oversold; X bullish divergence talk.

stocks.justification: Technical setup strong, but macro headwinds.

stocks.impact_theory: Sentiment shift on beaten-down stock post-6mo weakness; upgrades to Buy. Implications: Streaming recovery. Psychology: Bottom fishing. Parallels: 2022 ad-tier turnaround. Analogies: 1. Clearing storm clouds. 2. Underdog comeback.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Zacks/Yahoo note sentiment change; aligns with market rally.

potential_profit_risks.short_position: Limited upside if sub growth slows.

stocks.impact_theory: Beaten down 6mo, sentiment shift per analysts; cloud growth. Implications: Enterprise AI tailwinds. Psychology: Re-rating. Parallels: Post-Q3 buy reiterations. Analogies: 1. Sleeper waking. 2. Engine revving.
